schemas.name: Virtual Auditor
schemas.description: AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm offering IBBI-compliant valuations (ESOP, FEMA, Income Tax, Companies Act, SEBI, IBC, 409A, complex instruments, AIF), FEMA compliance, GST and income tax appeals, forensic accounting, company registration, and secretarial services across India.

address.streetAddress: G-131, Ground Floor, Phase 3, Spencer Plaza Mall, Anna Salai
Workafella, AK Estate, SV Road, off Veer Savarkar Flyover, Goregaon West

schemas.name: Accounting & Bookkeeping | Virtual Auditor
schemas.description: Accounting and bookkeeping by CA firm. Monthly P&L, balance sheet, bank reconciliation, GST returns, TDS filing. For startups and SMEs. From ₹5,000/month.

acceptedAnswer.text: Tally Prime, Zoho Books, QuickBooks, Xero. We adapt to your existing setup or recommend based on your business type.
Transaction recording, bank reconciliation, P&L, balance sheet, and GST return preparation. TDS filing and payroll are add-on services.

mainEntity.name: Do you support startups with no transactions?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Even companies with minimal activity need monthly compliance (nil GST returns, TDS returns if applicable). We offer startup-friendly packages.

mainEntity.name: What accounting software do you support?

acceptedAnswer.text: Tally Prime, Zoho Books, QuickBooks Online, Xero, and Busy Accounting. We can work with any cloud-based accounting platform. Bank feeds integration for automated reconciliation.

mainEntity.name: What is included in monthly bookkeeping?

acceptedAnswer.text: Transaction recording, bank reconciliation, P&L and balance sheet preparation, cash flow statement, receivables/payables tracking, GST return preparation data, and TDS computation. Monthly report delivered by 10th of following month.

From ₹5,000/month for up to 100 transactions. ₹8,000-₹12,000 for 100-300 transactions. ₹15,000+ for high-volume businesses. Includes bookkeeping, bank reconciliation, and financial statements. GST and TDS filing at additional fee.

Yes. Salary computation, PF/ESI calculation, TDS on salary (Section 192), payslip generation, Form 16 preparation, and full and final settlement. From ₹100 per employee per month (minimum ₹3,000/month).

mainEntity.name: Can you handle accounting for e-commerce businesses?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Marketplace reconciliation (Amazon, Flipkart, Meesho), TCS computation, multi-state GST compliance, inventory valuation, and return/refund accounting. E-commerce accounting requires specialised handling of commissions, TCS, and marketplace payouts.
